verdicts.note: Quote 'Modalities: mri' appears verbatim in e2 and directly establishes the value 'mri'.
Value is null with an accurate 'needs' note; e2 text contains no species/organism metadata, so the absence-of-evidence claim is correct and no unverified claim is made.

Quote matches e2 README verbatim ('This dataset contains neuroimaging data from 28 participants with treatment-resistant depression (TRD) who received six weeks of active or sham repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) combined with psychotherapy.') and directly establishes the disease population.
Quote 'Number of subjects: 28' appears verbatim in e2 and directly establishes the value '28'.
Value is null with an accurate 'needs' note; e2 only contains a snapshot 'Created' timestamp (2026-06-29T19:45:23.022Z), not study data-collection dates, so the claim of absence is correct.

All four quotes ('- T1-weighted anatomical MRI', '- T2-weighted anatomical MRI', '- Diffusion-weighted imaging (DTI)', and the fMRI sub-bullet block listing 'Goal priming task' and 'Resting-state fMRI') appear verbatim in the e2 README and directly establish each listed data type.
Quote 'License: CC0' appears verbatim in e2 and directly establishes the value 'CC0'.
Quote 'DatasetDOI: doi:10.18112/openneuro.ds008064.v1.0.0' appears verbatim in e2 and directly establishes the DOI value.
Quote 'OpenNeuro dataset ds008064 (snapshot 1.0.0)' appears verbatim as the first line of e2 and establishes OpenNeuro as the provider.
Value is null with an accurate 'needs' note; e2 contains no institutional/site/geographic information, only author names, so the absence claim is correct.

The only cited quote ('License: CC0') establishes the license, not the access mechanism/status. CC0 governs reuse rights, not whether/how the data can be accessed; no evidence text states the data is openly downloadable or describes an access procedure, so this quote does not genuinely establish 'access':'open'.
Value is null with an accurate 'needs' note; e2 contains no explicit access-procedure text.
Value is null with an accurate 'needs' note; e2 contains no pricing statement.

All three cited quotes ('License: CC0', the TRD/rTMS README sentence, and the 'structural and functional MRI data collected before and after the treatment protocol' sentence) appear verbatim in e2 and collectively support the synthesized description; data-type details (T1w, T2w, DTI, task/resting fMRI) trace back to the already-verified data_types quotes.

Same underlying verbatim quotes as short_desc_en; the Spanish text is an accurate translation of those supported facts (CC0 license, 28 TRD participants, six weeks active/sham rTMS with psychotherapy, structural/functional MRI including T1w, T2w, DWI, task and resting-state fMRI).
